title: melampyrum pratense f. ovatum
intro: Melampyrum pratense f. ovatum, also known as the Woodland Snorkel or Downy Monkey Flower, is a subspecies of perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant actions. The health benefits of Melampyrum pratense f. ovatum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive discomfort. Melampyrum pratense f. ovatum is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in infusions or added to smoking mixtures for its medicinal properties.
